interestingfact: India is the world’s largest democracy and home to the Taj Mahal.
The U.S. has the world’s largest economy and is known for Silicon Valley innovation.
China is home to the Great Wall, one of the Seven Wonders of the World.
Brazil hosts the Amazon Rainforest, the largest tropical rainforest in the world.
Russia is the largest country in the world by land area.
Japan is famous for its cherry blossoms and advanced technology.
Germany is known for its engineering excellence and Oktoberfest festival.
The UK is home to the iconic Big Ben and the British monarchy.
France is the most visited country in the world, with Paris known as the ‘City of Light’.
Australia is famous for the Great Barrier Reef and unique wildlife like kangaroos.
Canada has the longest coastline in the world.
South Africa is known as the ‘Rainbow Nation’ for its cultural diversity.
